terminology: SLAVE: Launch & Steering Primary Target radar slave

source.section: 4 - AN/ASQ-228 ATFLIR Targeting Pod > 4.7 - Air-to-Air Operation > 4.7.3 - Air-to-Air Radar Slaving (L+S Slave)

steps.action: Make sure the targeting pod and radar are powered
Press the A/A Master Mode button. The RDR ATTK (radar) page will appear on the right DDI and the FLIR page will appear on the left DDI.
Select RDR ATTK page by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the radar page (right).
The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
Acquire a radar lock using the TDC Slew and TDC DEPRESS controls.
Press the OSB next to L+S SLAVE (Launch & Steering Primary Target radar slave) to slave the slave the targeting pod to the radar lock (L&S trackfile).
Select FLIR by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
You can zoom and choose desired FLIR/TV setting using the appropriate Option Select Buttons on the FLIR page.
Press/bump the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the FLIR format page (left) to attempt to Auto Track the target.
